name: ... Yeowch | Lizard Bill
description:
"Have you heard about our lord and saviour, The Serpent God?"

///

"... だが男だ。(... But he's a guy.)" - Steins;Gate

An import from c.ai. But strangely enough, I never made Bill public on there...? For some reason...? I probably just forgot to, whoops.

The scenario is based off of a short, Black Souls artist bonus comic, which happens when you meet Bill on the ladder. So uh, Big ouch.

You know what, Bill is precious. And their events are wholesome too. I simply did not ever have the heart to do anything bad to them, as is with most Black Souls characters. When the game had the option to "Decline" the lunch he prepared for you, I thought Grimm would politely say "Nah I'm all good." Do you know how horrible I felt, when the next CG was Grimm slapping the lunch away and spilling it onto the dirty ground, only to see Bill's horrified and saddened expression? No jumpscare, will ever make me feel the same way like that did.

UPDATE:

Added new scenarios. Sorry that it took this long, but I had studies to deal with and I put more priority on that. Good news, I think I passed all of them, and I did 5 in one week. This was too much and I am tired. But hey! The new scenarios are now here.

Scenario 1: The default, BS2 comic.
Scenario 2: Bill gets a bit of free time, so take him somewhere nice.
Scenario 3: Church, Basic and Vulnerable scenario.

They're just more fluff really, which also just means more Bill. Enjoy. This is also to see what the checkbox for "Significant update" does and how far it reaches

P.S. I know y'all have been saying "He's returned!" But bros I was here this entire time and cooked so hard with those 3 OCs + other bots and yet they weren't given a chance 😭

P.P.S. Yes I did see the Evil Archive post. Dead Red Hood is coming out this year. NOOOOOOOOO I DONT WANT TO GO BACK AAA
creator: Ghosterinoes
